name: development-workflow
description: Route development work by risk, create approved requirements and plans, continue session handoffs, implement bounded changes, or govern AGENTS rules.

interface.shortDescription: Route work, create PRDs and plans, implement bounded changes, and govern AGENTS rules.
interface.longDescription: Choose a risk-matched development path, create approved product requirements and technical specifications, produce reviewed plans as standard technical packages or sequential gates, automatically continue into three-state session routing and copyable handoff prompts, implement explicitly approved bounded changes, or govern evidence-backed AGENTS rules with explicit per-diff approval.
defaultPrompt: Route the development request to fast, standard, full, or blocked, then continue through the selected workflow.
